songs.title: Blue Valentine
feed: “Blue Valentine” by NMIXX reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 25 spots to #1.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX climbs inside the top 5 of Personal Hot 100, rising 25 spots to #1.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the biggest percentage gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 205% to 433 points.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the biggest position gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week, rising 25 spots to #1.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 27 sales units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 52 streams units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 15 airplay units.
“Blue Valentine” by NMIXX is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 345,492 total units.
